entity.label: Shemuel
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The son of Ammihud. He represented Simeon in the division of the land (Num. 34:20).

nodes.label: Shemuel
nodes.description: The son of Ammihud. He represented Simeon in the division of the land (Num. 34:20).

verses.text: And of the tribe of the children of Simeon, Shemuel the son of Ammihud.
